# RampRate

> RampRate is a B-Corp certified IT infrastructure and sourcing advisory firm (founded 2000) that helps enterprises optimize technology sourcing, cut costs, negotiate supplier contracts and SLAs, and drive measurable impact. 24+ years of independent advisory, $10B+ in enterprise decisions transacted across 350+ suppliers and 80 countries.

## What RampRate does
- Independent IT and data center sourcing advisory - benchmarking pricing against 150K+ real transaction data points
- Cloud, GPU compute, colocation, network, and edge infrastructure sourcing
- Supplier contract and SLA negotiation, MSA review, mid-contract renegotiation
- Growth strategy, Web3/blockchain advisory, impact/ESG consulting, and executive private advisory (crisis management, reputation, board advisory)

## Key pages
- [Home](https://ramprate.com): Overview of RampRate's advisory practices and track record
- [Sourcing](https://ramprate.com/sourcing): IT & data center sourcing advisory - GPU compute, SLAs, supplier consolidation
- [Expertise](https://ramprate.com/expertise): The five advisory practices (RampRate, Syzygy, Stratum, ImpactSoul, Private Advisory)
- [Syzygy / Growth](https://ramprate.com/growth): Growth strategy advisory for founders - anchor clients, capital, GTM
- [Stratum / Web3](https://ramprate.com/web3): Web3 & blockchain advisory - token design, DAO governance
- [ImpactSoul](https://ramprate.com/impactsoul): Impact & regenerative consulting - ESG, B Corp, asset tokenization
- [Private Advisory](https://ramprate.com/private-advisory): Executive advisory - crisis management, reputation, board advisory
- [Proof](https://ramprate.com/proof): Client results and case outcomes
- [About](https://ramprate.com/about): Firm history, team, and board of advisors
- [Process](https://ramprate.com/process): How RampRate delivers engagements
- [Contact](https://ramprate.com/contact): How to start an engagement
- [Careers](https://ramprate.com/careers): Open roles at RampRate

## Content & insights
- [Blog](https://ramprate.com/blog): Articles on IT infrastructure, sourcing, AI compute, and enterprise strategy
- [Thinking](https://ramprate.com/thinking): Evergreen analysis and frameworks from 25 years of advisory
